{{Infobox artifact
| name = Urzaia's black hatchets
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Urzaia]]'s black hatchets are a pair of dark-colored, [[Awakened weapons]] used by the [[Izyrian gladiator]] and cook [[Urzaia Woodsman]]. Crafted by a master smith from [[Izyria]], these hatchets feature black shafts and blades that appear to absorb light. They are highly effective combat tools capable of splitting enemies in half, shattering missiles midair, and striking with enough force to crash through oak trees or drive massive creatures into stone. Beyond their physical strength, the weapons possess a unique [[Intent]] and are believed to serve as [[Urzaia's Vessel]]. They are essential to his combat style, which often involves wielding one in each hand to charge with immense power and speed.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Urzaia]] uses black hatchets as weapons.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] carries [[Urzaia]]'s hatchets.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Urzaia Woodsman]] wields black hatchets that appear to absorb light.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Urzaia]]'s hatchets struck the ground with the force of a thunderstorm.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Urzaia]] carries a hatchet in each hand.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c21">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Urzaia]] uses hatchets.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
